commit.message:
docs: add HTS ERC-20 facade deep-dive spec

- explains HTS tokens as native ledger entities vs EVM bytecode
- covers the ERC-20 facade (HIP-218), two-address rule, and association
- documents SafeERC20 / ERC-4626 incompatibility and the _deposit/_withdraw fix
- describes project test setup: MockHTS, FakeHederaToken, MintableERC20, and
  why new+vm.etch is used instead of deployCodeTo

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix critical: casino deposit must succeed BEFORE marking payment approved

Root cause: autoApprovePayment() marked payments as "approved" and showed
"FICHAS CARGADAS" popup even when casino deposit FAILED or was skipped.
User saw popup but had no fichas in 463.life.

Fixes:
1. Attempt casino deposit FIRST, before marking payment as approved
2. If casino deposit fails → retry once after re-login
3. If still fails → DON'T approve, leave pending for manual review
4. Only emit "FICHAS CARGADAS" popup when casino deposit actually succeeded
5. If casino not configured → approve but show different message
6. Remove direct match path in chat.routes.ts that bypassed confidence checks
7. Add session-expired auto-retry in casinoService.depositCredits()
8. Emit casino:deposit-failed event to admins on failure

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: update shadcn components to Tailwind v4 CSS variable syntax

In Tailwind v4, w-[--var] generates `width: --var` (invalid CSS) instead
of `width: var(--var)`. The correct v4 syntax is w-(--var) which wraps
in var(). This fixes the sidebar having 0px width (gap div not pushing
content) and broken transform origins on dropdowns/tooltips.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: use Tailwind v4 import syntax to restore responsive breakpoints

The old @tailwind base/components/utilities directives are Tailwind v3
syntax. With Tailwind v4 + @tailwindcss/postcss, these generate utility
classes but skip responsive breakpoint registration, causing all md:/lg:/sm:
classes to be silently dropped. This made the sidebar invisible (hidden
md:block never activates) and all layouts single-column.

Also replace hardcoded gray-* colors with theme-aware tokens for dark mode.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add electronic signatures (21 CFR Part 11) and change control workflow

E-signatures: reusable modal with password re-auth, reason, and declaration.
Integrated into investigation closure, manager report signing, and change
control approvals. Change control: 7-step workflow (Draft through Closed)
with auto-numbering, impact assessment, rollback plan, and e-sig required
for approval/verification transitions.

Add convergence indicator on scorecard rank number

Rank # turns teal (3/4 signals) or gold (4/4 signals) when independent
confirmations converge: entry signal, positive heat, S-driven score,
sector inflow. Hover shows which factors are present. Legend updated.

commit.message:
Anti-fraud system: CVU verification + time precision + CUIT/CVU mismatch penalties

OCR improvements:
- Extract receiverName, receiverCbu (destination CVU/CBU), and exact time (HH:mm)
- Enhanced prompt focused on anti-fraud field extraction

Matching improvements:
- Time proximity: ±5min = +7%, ±15min = +3%, >60min = -5% penalty
- CUIT mismatch = -15% penalty (strong fraud signal)
- CVU destination check: matches Palta = +5%, doesn't match = -20% penalty
- Same day bonus only if no time data available

Fraud detection:
- CVU destination verification on upload (comprobante CVU vs our Palta CVU)
- fraud:alert socket event emitted to admins on CVU mismatch
- cvuWarning stored in payment record for admin review

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

refactor: 7章模板C HTML报告重构 + 修复 _build_summary 显示全部标的

- generate_ml_report.py: 删除 _generate_swarm_section_html()，
  替换为 13 个独立章节方法（_ch1 ~ _ch7 + Scout/Oracle/Chronos/Buzz/Rival/Guard/Bear）
  * 第1章：核心结论（方向、综合分、置信度、3句摘要）
  * 第2章：五维评分明细表（Signal/Catalyst/Sentiment/Odds/RiskAdj）
  * 第3章：7 Agent 独立分析（含 ASCII 时间轴、信号共振矩阵）
  * 第4章：投资假设 + 失效条件表格
  * 第5章：4场景概率加权情景推演
  * 第6章：风险雷达（emoji 颜色等级）
  * 第7章：明日追踪任务 checkbox
  * 止损止盈/期权/ML 详情移至底部 <details> 折叠区
- report_formatters.py: 修复 _build_summary() 硬编码 [:3]，
  改为按阈值分组显示全部标的（高优先级≥7.5 / 观察名单6.0~7.4 / 暂不行动<6.0）

Resolve human-readable species names from SBML annotations and replace RoadRunner fallback with COPASI retry cascade

Extract UniProt/KEGG identifiers from SBML annotation blocks and resolve them
to proper protein/compound names via REST APIs. Clean up BioNetGen-style state
annotations and x##_ prefixes for models without annotations. Show database IDs
in hover tooltips. Replace the RoadRunner NaN fallback with a COPASI-native
retry strategy: more internal steps → RADAU5 stiff solver → looser tolerances.

feat: add integration connector framework with 9 connectors

- CSV/SFTP: universal ERP connector (covers SAP, NetSuite, Fishbowl, QuickBooks)
- Retailer connectors: Walmart GDSN, Kroger 84.51, Whole Foods, Costco
- Food safety: FoodReady, FoodDocs, Tive cold chain trackers
- Integration API router: configure, test, sync, CSV upload, webhook endpoints
- Updated integrations page to show all connectors with ready indicators

commit.message:
Add word search planets thumbnail

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Before/After view, Windows theming, tool deselection, and AI Denoise defaults

- Before/After: add sidebar margins to beforeAfterBox, show original image
  as default "Before" (history[0] instead of history[size-2]), add ipc null check
- Windows theming: fix CSS -gtk-icon-size breaking theme load on Windows GTK,
  add background-color to editor containers (#EditorViewPaned, #EditorEditBox,
  #EditorRightPaned, toolbars, #FileBrowser), white text for MaskTreeView
- Adjuster: hide spin widget for named sliders (render value via Cairo),
  remove broken gtk_container_forall calls (not a container on Windows)
- Tool deselection: auto-deselect perspective/crop tools when switching tabs
- AI Denoise: checkbox unchecked by default (require enabled && blend > 0)

commit.message:
Refine Palta matching: exact name + time proximity + amount for accuracy

- Lower base confidence: exact=95%, partial=85% (was 100/90)
- Add time proximity bonus: ±10min OCR vs Palta = +5% (Argentina UTC-3)
- Reduce CUIT bonus to +5% (was +10%)
- Same day bonus reduced to +2% (was +5%), only if not already 100%
- Auto-approve threshold remains 90%: exact name alone won't auto-approve,
  needs at least one corroborating signal (time, CUIT, or same day)

fix: Upgrade onnxruntime-gpu to >=1.19 for cuDNN 9 support (#229)

onnxruntime-gpu 1.17.1 requires cuDNN 8, but VastAI/RunPod containers
now ship cuDNN 9. Symlink hacks can't bridge this ABI gap. Upgrading
to >=1.19.0 which natively supports CUDA 12 + cuDNN 9 from standard
PyPI — no Microsoft extra-index-url needed.

- requirements_base.txt / requirements.txt: onnxruntime-gpu >=1.19.0
- installer.py: restore verify_onnx_runtime() post-install check

aspect-auto to override the default aspect ratio on all 6 charts.

Fix date picker popup getting clipped by overflow:hidden containers

Popup is now appended to document.body with fixed positioning and
placed using getBoundingClientRect() relative to the trigger. This
prevents .card overflow:hidden and #main overflow-y:auto from
clipping the calendar. Also adds destroy() method and cleanup of
orphaned popups when detail view re-renders.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Re-score candidates after scan market to include heat bonus

Scan market scored without comboHeatBonus (defaults to 0), while
calibrate→rescoreCandidates baked heat into compositeScore. This caused
scores to diverge between the two paths. Now scan market calls
rescoreCandidates() after saving, so both paths produce consistent scores.

Remove htmlmin dependency, use pure Python HTML minification

htmlmin (2018 package) may fail on Python 3.12+. Replace with
inline regex-based HTML minification (remove comments, collapse
whitespace). No external dependencies needed for minification.

feat: marketplace V2 — native marketplace.json + plugin-dev skill (#10)

Converts the marketplace from the inline-copy architecture (V1) to
Claude Code's native marketplace.json model (DEC-MARKET-006):

- Add .claude-plugin/marketplace.json listing atuin-history with
  GitHub source (Mastermjr/atuin-claude-ctrl-plugin). Claude Code
  clones from the source repo directly — no inline file copies needed.
- Add .claude-plugin/plugin.json making the marketplace repo itself
  a plugin that provides the plugin-dev skill (DEC-MARKET-007).
- Create skills/plugin-dev/SKILL.md — comprehensive 795-line reference
  for the full Claude Code plugin system: manifest, all 6 source types,
  all component types, all 14 hook events, 3 hook types, marketplace
  authoring, strict mode, caching, CLI commands, distribution patterns
  (DEC-SKILL-001).
- Remove plugins/ directory (inline file copies, superseded by
  marketplace.json GitHub source).
- Remove .github/workflows/sync-atuin-history.yml (sync workflow,
  superseded by native GitHub source resolution).
- Rewrite README.md to accurately reflect the new architecture.

Move account+provider creation into a service-level transaction to
prevent orphaned accounts on failure. Fix removeLabelFromIssue to
filter by both issueId and labelId instead of deleting all labels.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: correct frontmatter field name pubDate -> pubDatetime

astro-paper schema requires pubDatetime (ISO 8601) not pubDate.
Also update docs/context.md writing guide accordingly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: Singer-first rule — 60-70% singer shots with lip sync

The videos looked bad because the pipeline was distributing shots equally
across 9 angles. Fixed:
1. Singer must appear in 60-70% of shots when vocals are present
2. Singer prompt MUST include "mouth open singing, lip sync, close-up face"
3. Only cut to instruments/crowd during clear instrumental breaks
4. Pattern: singer(4s) → cutaway(2s) → singer(4s) → cutaway(2s)

Also updated analyze_audio.ts Gemini prompt with same rules.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: filter Whisper hallucinations from transcription results

Whisper generates phantom phrases like 'ご清聴ありがとうございました'
from silence/noise. Added a hallucination filter that blocks known
phantom phrases in both interim and final transcriptions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add Rose + Lissajous distributors, Breathing Rings bundle (Phase 3+4)

- RoseDistributor: r = cos(k·θ) rose curve, configurable petal count (k)
  and radius; animated marching-ants gizmo traces the full curve
- LissajousDistributor: x = rx·sin(fx·t + phase), y = ry·cos(fy·t);
  freqX/freqY ratio determines shape (1:2 figure-8, 2:3 pretzel, 3:4 butterfly);
  animated gizmo traces the Lissajous path
- Breathing Rings bundle: concentric circles at origin driven by scale ramp
  (0.15→1.8) + hue sweep teal→violet + opacity fade, no distributor needed
- Register new distributors in componentRegistry and add live preview cards
  to the Add Component menu

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
